steps.title: Attach the opening phrase
steps.content: The opening phrase Named in 1999 as one of the greatest achievements must describe the noun that immediately follows it. The thing named as an achievement is Julian's synthesis of physostigmine, not Julian himself, the year 1935, or the alkaloid by itself.

steps.title: Place the right noun
steps.content: C correctly begins with Julian's 1935 synthesis, so the modifier attaches to the achievement and that noun phrase can serve as the subject of led. A places Julian after the modifier. B places a date after it. D places the compound after it, implying the compound itself was named the achievement. The answer is C.
